w:r.w:t: Dynamic score updates based on chatbot responses
Senior salesperson assignment for high-score leads
Junior salesperson assignment for low-score leads
Quick quotation creation through item selection
Share approved Purchase Orders with the supplier

Facebook/WhatsApp/Website Leads → AI Lead Scoring → Chatbot Qualification → Smart Lead Assignment → Sales Coordinator Review → Sales Follow-ups → Quick Quotation → Sales Won/Lost → Purchase Order → Head Office Approval → Share PO with Supplier → Delivery Updates → Installation → Customer Feedback → Warranty & Service → Complaint Resolution → HR & Employee Tracking → Sales Target Monitoring → Analytics & Automated Notifications
Admin, Sales Coordinator, Head Office, HR, Finance, Support
WhatsApp Chatbot, Website Chatbot, Facebook Lead Integration
